data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the requirement for unpaid drive time tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Unpaid drive time tracking (for timesheets)', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions unpaid drive time tracking but lacks specific data or endpoints that validate this aspect. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No concrete API reads or persisted state checks confirming unpaid drive time tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
